title: Fossils & Archaeology Unearthed
description: A fossils and archeology modpack for 1.20 with new tech, farming, and more!
body:
![mp logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/006d0c82de2abd1cd4a0e12695b3499b53561978.png)

The long awaited F&A port has finally been released making it the perfect base for this modpack. My goal with this pack is to enhance the F&A experiance without straying to far from the vanilla style

Credit to all the amazing devs who's mods are in this pack.





### **New world generation**


Explore and settle new polished terrain. Underground rivers, larger biomes, and deeper oceans spread throughout the world for you to explore. The end and nether have also been given a makeover to allow for scaled terrain within these dimensions. You may also encounter new structures some containing valuable loot.



### **Technology**



Make useful new machines and contraptions through the use of create and its addons. 



### **Agriculture**



Grow many new foods with mods like farmers delight to keep your prehistoric animals well fed. Along with this many other mods such as farming in rain, right click harvest, and overweight farming have been added to further enhance the agriculture experience.
